creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Don't know if this is helpful, but running qpdf on a LibreOffice PDF export from a terminal:

FreeBSD coral.acadix  bacon ~ 1005: qpdfview residence.pdf 
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory
